text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd at the Yasuda Kinen is even more riled
up than usual. They're expecting a lot from Fuji
Kiseki.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She meets her fans' cheers with a gracious smile,
but Hishi Amazon notices there's something off
about her.
